SIEGFRIEDSABER-STRIKE.title: Strike
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DEFEND.title: Defend
SIEGFRIEDSABER-BALMUNG.title: Balmung: Unleashed
SIEGFRIEDSABER-BALMUNG.description: #Consume ALL your NP Charge, at least 100. Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies, plus 1 for every 10 NP Charge above 100 — or 2 instead while your Dragon Scales are 3 or higher.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-EXPOSED_BACK.title: Exposed Back
SIEGFRIEDSABER-EXPOSED_BACK.description: #Deal !D! damage. This turn, your Dragon Scales reduce NO incoming hits.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_SCAR.title: Linden Scar
SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_SCAR.description: #Each time an attack pierces your *Dragon Scales, gain 1 Dragon Scale and !Scar! *NP Charge.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DRAGONBLOOD_CUT.title: Dragonblood Cut
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DRAGONBLOOD_CUT.descripti: #Deal !D! damage. Deal !Bonus! more while your *Dragon Scales are 3 or higher. Gain !Np! *NP Charge.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-BLOOD_BAPTISM.title: Blood Baptism
SIEGFRIEDSABER-GRANI_STALK.title: Grani's Stalk
SIEGFRIEDSABER-GOLDEN_RULE.title: Golden Rule
SIEGFRIEDSABER-GOLDEN_RULE.description: #Whenever you gain *NP Charge this combat, gain 50% more.+ Also gain 1 *Strength.+
SIEGFRIEDSABER-IRON_GUARD.title: Iron Guard
SIEGFRIEDSABER-BALMUNG_SWING.title: Balmung Swing
SIEGFRIEDSABER-BRAVE_RESOLVE.title: Brave Resolve
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DRAGON_SCALE_GUARD.title: Dragon-Scale Guard
SIEGFRIEDSABER-HEAVY_BLOW.title: Heavy Blow
SIEGFRIEDSABER-HEROS_BACKSWING.title: Hero's Backswing
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DRAGON_SLAYER_STRIKE.desc: #Deal !D! damage. Deal !Bonus! more while your *Dragon Scales are !Threshold! or higher.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-GATHER_PROWESS.title: Gather Prowess
SIEGFRIEDSABER-WEIGHT_OF_EXPECTATIONS.de: #At the end of your turn, if you played no Attacks this turn, gain !NpGain! *NP Charge and 1 *Dragon Scales. Up to 2 triggers per turn.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-LAST_WILL.title: Last Will
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DRAGON_HUNTER_STRIKE.desc: #Deal !D! damage. Deal !Bonus! more while your *Dragon Scales are !Threshold! or higher.+ Gain 2 *Strength this turn.+
SIEGFRIEDSABER-FAFNIRS_EXECUTIONER.title: Fafnir's Executioner
SIEGFRIEDSABER-FAFNIRS_EXECUTIONER.descr: #Deal !D! damage. Deal 1 more for every 4 *Dragon Scales, up to 6 more. Dragon Slayer: deal 6 more to an Elite or Boss.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DRAGON_SLAYERS_EDGE.title: Dragon Slayer's Edge
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DRAGON_SLAYERS_EDGE.descr: #Deal !D! damage, plus 1 for every *Dragon Scales you have (maximum !MaxBonus!).
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DRAGONBLOOD_ASCENDANT.des: #At the start of each turn, gain !ScalesPerTurn! *Dragon Scales. When played, gain !Entry! *Dragon Scales.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-DEAD_DRAGONS_EDGE.title: Whetted on Dead Scales
SIEGFRIEDSABER-STRATEGIC_WITHDRAWAL.desc: #Exhaust. Gain !B! *Bulwark Block. Remove all Debuffs from yourself.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-CROWN_OF_THE_PEERLESS.des: #The first attack that pierces your *Dragon Scales each turn deals no damage and removes 1 Debuff from you.+ When this triggers, gain 5 *NP Charge.+
SIEGFRIEDSABER-NIBELUNG_HOARD.title: Hort der Nibelungen
SIEGFRIEDSABER-NIBELUNG_HOARD.descriptio: #Exhaust. Gain !Scales! *Dragon Scales and !Np! *NP Charge. Permanently add a Regret to your deck.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-TARNKAPPE.title: Tarnkappe
SIEGFRIEDSABER-TARNKAPPE.description: #Exhaust. Gain !Scales! *Dragon Scales. For the rest of combat your back is no longer exposed: the first attack that reaches you each turn is reduced by your Dragon Scales like every other. While active, your scales no longer pierce and the Linden Leaf grants no NP Charge.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-BY_MY_CONVICTION.title: By My Own Conviction
SIEGFRIEDSABER-BY_MY_CONVICTION.descript: #Exhaust. Choose one: gain 50 *NP Charge or 3 *Dragon Scales.+ Upgraded: gain both.+
SIEGFRIEDSABER-CONVICTION_CHARGE.title: Charge
SIEGFRIEDSABER-CONVICTION_SCALES.title: Harden
